steps.title: Identify the vertex and use symmetry
steps.content:
• Vertex form: $$h(t)=a(t-3)^2+51.1$$
  • Since the projectile starts at height 7 m at $$t=0$$, the axis of symmetry passes through the vertex at $$t=3$$.
  • For any two times with the same height, their average equals the vertex time: $$\frac{t_1+t_2}{2}=3$$.

steps.title: Compute the return time
steps.content:
• Set $$t_1=0$$ (launch) and solve for $$t_2$$: $$\frac{0+t_2}{2}=3 \implies t_2=6$$ seconds.
  • That matches choice B — B is correct.
